overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character carrying a lantern walking through a snowy mountainous forest at night. The character traverses from open pine woods into a narrow rocky canyon, emerges to a mountain overlook with valley views, and continues along a cliffside trail.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a snow-covered forest path carrying a lantern

entered.detail: tall pine trees covered in snow flanking both sides of the path
narrow trail covered in fresh snow winding through the forest
snow-capped mountain range visible through the trees in the distance
large fallen log lying among the snow-covered undergrowth
small rocky formation emerging from the snow on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide-open snowy pine forest at night, carrying a lantern that illuminates the immediate path. Snow-covered trees flank both sides while distant mountains are visible through the misty atmosphere.

events.description: character enters narrow rocky canyon from open forest, walls rising on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking into a narrow canyon passage between tall rock walls

entered.detail: tall sheer rock face forming the left wall of the canyon
tall rocky cliff forming the right wall of the narrow passage
scattered rocks and boulders along the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow rocky canyon where tall stone walls rise on both sides, blocking the sky and creating a sheltered, dimly lit passage. The path continues through snow-covered ground between the rock faces.

events.description: character exits the canyon to an open mountain overlook revealing expansive valley views

agents.ego_description: emerging from the canyon and walking along a ridge with panoramic valley views

entered.detail: expansive view of a wide valley with snow-covered forest below
dense forest canopy visible in the valley below the overlook
low snow-laden shrubs lining the path at the canyon exit

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow canyon, the scene opens to a dramatic mountain overlook with expansive views of a snow-covered valley below. The character walks along a ridge path with the rock wall still on the left and the open vista on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail along rock face

agents.ego_description: continuing along the narrow mountain path with rock wall on the left

entered.detail: dense snow-covered bushes and undergrowth close to the path

segments.scene_description: The path continues along the mountainside, becoming more enclosed with a steep rock wall on the left and snow-covered vegetation on the right. The expansive valley view is now behind as the character proceeds deeper into the mountain trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character traverses a vast, snowy wilderness that gradually constricts into a narrow stone corridor. It begins in a wide-open pine forest at night, where a handheld lantern casts a warm glow on the snow-covered ground amidst a misty atmosphere of distant mountains. As the character advances, the open woodland begins to close in, with the expansive sky disappearing behind rising terrain. The scene then shifts into a narrow rocky canyon, where towering stone walls flank both sides to create a sheltered, dimly lit passage. The camera continues forward through this confined space, following the snowy path as it winds between the steep rock faces.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide, dramatic mountain overlook into a more enclosed cliffside trail. It begins as the character exits a narrow canyon, opening up to an expansive vista of a snow-covered valley stretching out to the right. As the character walks along the ridge path, the open horizon gradually recedes behind them while the rock wall on the left remains a constant presence. The scene then shifts as the path winds deeper into the mountainside, with the wide valley view disappearing and the environment becoming increasingly confined. Finally, the trail narrows further, flanked by a steep rock wall and dense, snow-covered vegetation.
